infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SpendWise uses the microphone to let you log expenses by voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: SpendWise uses speech recognition to convert your spoken expense into text.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SpendWise to access your photos for receipt attachments.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SpendWise to use the camera to scan receipts.
